footer.tagline: Ride on your terms. Fair fares, agreed together.
footer.made_with: Built for riders and drivers everywhere.

cities.subtitle: inDrive is expanding fast — find your city and start riding or earning today.
cities.title: Available in 700+ Cities Worldwide

download.disclaimer: Available for iOS 13.0 and later. Android 8.0 and above required for Google Play.
download.subtitle: Set your price, choose your driver, and ride on your terms — all from your pocket.
download.title: Your Ride, Your Rules. Download inDrive.

drivers.benefit1: Keep more of every fare — low commission guaranteed
drivers.benefit2: Accept only the rides you want, on your schedule
drivers.benefit4: Get paid fast with instant withdrawals
drivers.benefit5: Access 24/7 driver support whenever you need it
drivers.benefit6: Join a global community of millions of drivers
drivers.image_alt: Smiling driver sitting in car ready to accept rides on inDrive
drivers.subtitle: Set your own rates, accept rides on your terms, and earn more behind the wheel.
drivers.title: Drive More. Earn More. Stay in Control.

hero.headline_accent: Ride on your terms — negotiate your fare directly with drivers.
hero.phone_alt: inDrive app showing fare negotiation screen
hero.subtext: Name your price, choose your driver, and ride on your terms — no surge pricing, ever.

how.step1_desc: Open the app and enter where you want to go in seconds.
how.step2_desc: Propose a fare that works for your budget — you're in control.
how.step3_desc: Nearby drivers see your offer and send you their best counter-offers.
how.step4_desc: Pick the driver you like, confirm the fare, and enjoy your ride.
how.subtitle: Getting a ride with inDrive takes just four simple steps — and you call the shots every time.
how.title: Rides That Work Your Way

safety.feat1_desc: Every driver is thoroughly vetted with background and license checks before their first trip.
safety.feat2_desc: Share your live trip details with trusted contacts so someone always knows where you are.
safety.feat3_desc: Reach our dedicated safety team any time of day or night with one tap.
safety.feat4_desc: Rate your driver after every ride to help keep our community safe and accountable.
safety.image_alt: Passenger sitting safely in an inDrive vehicle during a trip
safety.subtitle: Every ride is monitored with real-time GPS tracking, verified drivers, and a one-tap emergency alert so you always feel protected.
safety.title: Your Safety, Every Mile

testimonials.t1_quote: I love that I can negotiate the fare before I even get in the car. No surprises, no surge pricing — just a fair deal every time.
testimonials.t2_quote: Switching to inDrive was a game-changer. I set my own price, get more rides, and keep more of what I earn.
testimonials.t3_quote: The SOS feature gives me real peace of mind when I'm riding alone at night. I feel genuinely safe using this app.
testimonials.title: Millions of Riders Trust inDrive
